ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., 24, 26) */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in cm */,
  "hem" REAL /* Hem measurement in cm */,
  "inside_leg" REAL /* Inside leg measurement in cm */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Slim, Regular, Relaxed) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is designed for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., pants, shirts) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity available */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is suitable for */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Target age group for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is currently available for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the availability status */,
  "min_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum stock threshold for alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was changed */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed (can be positive or negative) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used in the size chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is designed for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the target chart */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the converted size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size they prefer */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if this size is marked as a favorite */,
  "preferred_brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred brand */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for this size */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded sales count */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the analytics */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
